name: PoolManager
description: Thin orchestrator for PoolManager — stub methods only, computation in helpers

documentation.description: @notice Internal swap function to execute a swap, take protocol fees on input token, and emit the swap event
@notice Adds a balance delta in a currency for a target address
@notice Accounts the deltas of 2 currencies to a target address
@notice Implementation of the _getPool function defined in ProtocolFees
@notice Implementation of the _isUnlocked function defined in ProtocolFees

@dev Private method is used instead of inlining into modifier because modifiers are copied into each method,
     and the use of immutable means the address bytes are copied in every place the modifier is used.
